title: Anthropic's New Consulting Venture Makes Its First Acquisition
full_text:
Anthropic-Backed AI Services Firm Acquires Fractional AI in First Deal - Bloomberg
Anthropic:
$965 Billion Valuation
Billionaire Founders
New Mythos-Level Models
What Is Mythos?
Jobs at Anthropic
Andrej Karpathy
Back Forward
Technology
AI
Gift this article
Contact us: Provide news feedback or report an error
Confidential tip? Send a tip to our reporters
Site feedback: Take our Survey
By Preeti Singh
May 21, 2026 at 12:00 PM UTC
Save
The new artificial intelligence enterprise services firm backed by Blackstone Inc. , Anthropic PBC and Hellman & Friedman has picked a San Francisco firm called Fractional AI as the operational centerpiece of the as-yet unnamed venture.
With the tie-up, Fractional AI will end its 11-month partnership with OpenAI, according to people familiar with the terms of the deal.
